Video.summary: A hit-and-run defendant admits there was a crash but says the plaintiff failed to come to a complete stop; former friends are entangled in a legal rumble as one is suing for two lost phones, while the other is countersuing for breach of contract.
Video.title: Crash, Cash and Conflict

Video.summary: Two cousins find themselves embroiled in litigation over breach of contract; a couple sue their former roommate for unpaid rent, utility bills, late fees and lost wages.
Video.title: Family Ties, Broken Leases

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: The plaintiff accuses the defendant of stealing her tax return; a claim of $5,000 in financial turmoil and emotional distress is what has a former couple in court.
Video.title: Taxed to the Limit

Video.summary: The ashes of a deceased pet have exes Tianie and Abner rehashing issues from their recent breakup.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Ownership of music rights brings former business partners and lovers to court.
Video.title: Curtis vs. Garland

Video.summary: The Cutlers' compatibility test helps Victor and Keisha settle a dispute over ugly women in the bedroom.
Video.title: Leaks vs. Holley

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: Marlene sues her ex, David, for $5,000, claiming he’s a deadbeat who never repaid her loans. David countersues for $5,000, alleging she stole from him. He claims she’s materialistic and only misses their mornings together.
Video.title: Bickering Over Bills

Video.summary: Mary Hughes sues Jacqueline for $1,400, claiming she was scammed out of a new window. Jacqueline says delays were due to reordering the correct custom window and claims prep work costs justify no refund.
Video.title: Crooked Contractor

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: Sade confronts her boyfriend, Jeremy, in court about his gambling addiction and bill money spent on lottery tickets.
Video.title: Black vs. Wiles

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: After an incident involving the police and damage to her car, LaShawn grapples with her ex-boyfriend Mario's militant personality.
Video.title: Brown vs. Monk

Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: An 11-year age difference and an aborted pregnancy put Illinois couple Shakia and Leontae in a power struggle.
Video.title: Yancy vs. Spaulding

Video.summary: The Stallworths bring their relational issues to the Cutlers in a last ditch effort to save their marriage.
Video.title: Stallworth vs Stallworth

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A father's doubt and a mother's plea collide in court over paternity, love and a baby's future.
Video.title: Willis vs. Hagans

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: Plaintiff Caitlin Crommett sues landlord Allan Arfa for $4,135, claiming her apartment was infested with bedbugs. Allan denies the infestation, alleging Caitlin fabricated the story to break her lease early. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Bed Bug Infestation

Video.summary: Plaintiffs Susan and Anthony claim Kim owes $744 for car repairs after paying only $56 due to a clerical error. Kim argues she paid the billed amount and was misled by the plaintiffs. Both sides accuse each other of taking advantage.
Video.title: Repair Bill Riot

Video.summary: Samuel and Melissa sue Dean and Bashaar for $1,721, alleging an assault at a red light, including damage to their car. Dean claims Samuel provoked the incident and that there was no damage.
Video.title: Taking Your Anger Out on a Car

Image.alt: Taking Your Anger Out on a Car
Taking Your Anger Out on a Car
Taking Your Anger Out on a Car

Video.summary: Wendy Noe is suing her husband, Thomas, for $3,000, claiming he stole her cats, winter clothes, and furniture. Thomas denies the claims, saying Wendy didn’t want the cats and is suing to get back into his house.
Video.title: Drunken Domestic Drama

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: A woman says her former roommate moved out after three months because he wanted more from their relationship than she was willing to give, and she sues him for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Unrequited Rent

Video.summary: Heather is suing her mother. After she bred her dog, her mother gave two of the puppies to her sister to sell.
Video.title: Dog Tired

Video.summary: Sherri is suing her ex-husband for her son's unpaid medical bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Teaching a Life Lesson

Video.summary: A man asked his roommate to watch his puppy when he was out of town, but the puppy died in her care, so he is suing; she says she had nothing to do with the puppy's death and denies owing anything.
Video.title: Paw Prints of Deceit

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.
Video.title: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Image.alt: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that, two years ago, her mother confessed that the defendant may be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Are You My Father?

Video.summary: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.
Video.title: Smart Mouth and Bad Attitude

Video.summary: First, business partners dispute over a loan. Then, plaintiff provided legal services and is suing client.
Video.title: It's Just Business

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues her landlord for rent money. Then, man believes he was duped by a car seller.
Video.title: A Roach and a Lemon

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff says friend skipped out on their lease. Then, man alleges ex stole his jewelry.
Video.title: Skipping Out

Video.summary: First, the defendant failed to pay a personal loan. Then, a woman seeks repayment for a down payment on a car.
Video.title: Not a Charity

Video.summary: First, a sister sues her brother for $5000. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy.
Video.title: Oh, Brother

Video.summary: First, an ex-girlfriend sues for bowling ball purchase. Then, a friend sues ex-band member.
Video.title: Bowling for Dupes

Video.summary: A salon client sues a stylist, who says she did as she was told; litigants feud over whether their cars collided.
Video.title: Not So Stylish

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims he was tricked for loan payments. Then, a customer has failed to remit payment.
Video.title: Resisting Restitution

Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under
